title: meliosma alba
intro: Meliosma alba, also known as the white meliosma, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Meliosma alba include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Meliosma alba typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves into teas, capsules, or tinctures for various medicinal uses.
